title: Lecture Notes in Computer Science
summary: Lecture Notes in Computer Science is a series of computer science books published by Springer Science+Business Media since 1973.
summary_sentences: Lecture Notes in Computer Science is a series of computer science books published by Springer Science+Business Media since 1973.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Lecture Notes in Computer Science is a series of computer science books published by Springer Science+Business Media since 1973.
sentences: Lecture Notes in Computer Science is a series of computer science books published by Springer Science+Business Media since 1973.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.text:
The series contains proceedings , post- proceedings , monographs , and Festschrifts . In addition, tutorials , state-of-the-art surveys, and "hot topics" are increasingly being included. [ citation needed ]
The series is indexed by DBLP .
